title: Polar vortex collapse forecast for U.S., Canada: Heavy snowfall, severe tornado alert, thunderstorm warning issued for Easter Saturday
description: U.S. Weather Forecast: Freezing rain will pound areas across eastern Minnesota, Northern Wisconsin, and Northern Michigan. The ice storm may lead to tree damages and power outages in those areas.
content:

de: Vorhersage eines Zusammenbruchs des Polarwirbels für die USA und Kanada: Starker Schneefall, schwere Tornado-Warnung, Gewitterwarnung für Ostersamstag. Wettervorhersage für die USA: Eisiger Regen wird Gebiete in Ost-Minnesota, Nord-Wisconsin und Nord-Michigan treffen. Der Eissturm kann in diesen Gebieten zu Baumschäden und Stromausfällen führen.
en: Polar vortex collapse forecast for U.S., Canada: Heavy snowfall, severe tornado alert, thunderstorm warning issued for Easter Saturday. U.S. Weather Forecast: Freezing rain will pound areas across eastern Minnesota, Northern Wisconsin, and Northern Michigan. The ice storm may lead to tree damages and power outages in those areas.
la: Praecognoscere ruinam polaris vortice Americae, Canada: Gravis nix, gravis turbo vigilans, tonitruum monitum Saturni Paschatis edita. U.S. Tempestas Weather: glauca pluvia areas per Minnesotam orientalem, Wisconsin septentrionalem, et Michigan Septentrionalem. Tempestas glaciei potest ducere ad damna lignorum et vim outages in locis illis.
